title: Emu/Tern Charge Case battery status
scenario: Charge case battery status displays green percentage when open with earbuds inside, greys out with last known percentage when earbuds removed or case closed on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the app is on the Home screen showing connected device status.
3. With both earbuds inside the charge case, open the case lid.
4. Observe the battery status display on the Home screen for the connected device (Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20).
5. Remove one earbud from the charge case while the case remains open.
6. Observe the charge case battery status display.
7. Remove the second earbud from the charge case while the case remains open.
8. Observe the charge case battery status display.
9. Place both earbuds back into the charge case and close the lid.
10. Observe the charge case battery status display.
11. Open the charge case lid again with both earbuds inside.
12. Observe the charge case battery status display.
expected: When the charge case is opened with both earbuds inside, the charge case battery level is shown as a green percentage below the earbuds' battery levels, centered in the status box. When one or both earbuds are removed from the open case, or when the case is closed (with or without earbuds inside), the charge case battery icon is greyed out and displays the last known battery percentage.
